name: Auerbach Grayson
description: We are a U.S. based global stock broking firm doing business in over 120 countries. We began covering Africa in 1994 and we partner with local stock broking firms in 25 countries in Africa.

## AUERBACH GRAYSON
* * *
Auerbach Grayson & Co (abbr: AGCO) is a New York-based brokerage firm committed to serving the international needs of major US institutional investors. Through its worldwide network of broker partners, Auerbach Grayson offers research, execution and clearance in equities, derivatives and fixed-income instruments.
## A FAR-REACHING VISION
In the early 1990s, David Grayson and the late Jonathan Auerbach recognized a dramatic shift in the investment needs of U.S. institutions venturing into global markets. In increasing numbers, these investors were seeking the same benefits of value investing and quality execution they were achieving in their domestic portfolios.
In response, Auerbach and Grayson conceived a new bottom-up methodology for accessing the international markets and formed Auerbach Grayson & Company to put it into practice. From the beginning, our firm and its global-network concept proved successful in fulfilling its mission and improving all aspects of institutional investing abroad.

tavily.answer:
Auerbach Grayson is a global brokerage firm founded in 1993, offering research and trading services in over 120 countries. It is regulated by FINRA and has its headquarters in New York. The firm is known for its extensive network of broker partners worldwide.
Auerbach Grayson is a global financial services firm with offices in New York. It focuses on research, trading access, and capital markets solutions. The company has 51-200 employees.
Auerbach Grayson is a global brokerage firm founded in 1993, providing research and trading access in over 120 countries. It operates as an independent agency-only firm. Crunchbase data for Auerbach Grayson is not available.
Auerbach Grayson is a global brokerage firm founded in 1993, specializing in providing institutional investors with access to over 120 capital markets worldwide. It was acquired by MNC Kapital in partnership with David Grayson. The firm is headquartered in New York.
Auerbach Grayson & Company was acquired by MNC Kapital in 2026, becoming a part of MNC Group's distribution network. The firm specializes in global trade execution and research for institutional investors. It has a global network in over 120 countries.

target_market: International needs of major US institutional investors
